---
title: Quantum Meets AI, 2026 
---



Quantum Meets AI is 1+3 day event with an International Conference on <r>Quantum Computing</r>, followed by a 3-day workshop, <r>DFT+ML</r>, on the intersection of quantum materials and artificial intelligence. The workshop will cover the fundamentals of Density Functional Theory (DFT), machine learning techniques for materials science, and cheminformatics approaches for representing chemical data.

## Schedule

This event will be held in person at the Ghulam Ishaq Khan Institute of Information Technology, Topi, Pakistan from July 13-16, 2026.

- July 13, 2026: International Conference on Quantum Computing
- July 14-16, 2026: Workshop on DFT and Machine Learning 

## Registration
Click here for the registration [form](form.qmd). Registrations close on June 25, 2026.

You can register either for the full 4-day event (conference + workshop) or just for the 3-day workshop. The conference will be held on July 13, 2026, and the workshop will run from July 14-16, 2026.

For further information on the conference, please visit the [conference overview](overview-conference.qmd). For more details on the workshop, please see the [workshop overview](overview-workshop.qmd).
